overview: SADHYA is a premium landing website for an exclusive Kerala supper club dining experience. It showcases the brand's warm, cultural identity through Kerala-inspired design, featuring sections for the experience story, menu preview, event details, and a booking form with WhatsApp integration.
features: Full-viewport hero with Kerala-inspired animated backdrop
About section with cultural highlight cards
Event details with date and seat info
Kerala food gallery with hover zoom
Smooth scroll navigation with sticky header
